headline: Getting a Better Doctor After a Job Site Accident
articleBody: When you're hurt on site, the insurance company often picks the doctor. But what if they don't take your pain seriously? You deserve a second opinion. In many cases, you have the right to request a change, but the rules are tricky in Utah and Idaho. If you feel stuck with a doctor who’s rushing you back to work, we can help you navigate the system for better care.
